$comment: Default template catalog for Casals. These WASMs are uploaded to the file-registry and authorized on the backend by scripts/seed.py. Each entry is one *version* of a template family (`key`); the authorized-WASM key is `<key>@<version>` and a sheet/upgrade that references a bare family name resolves to the latest version. List multiple entries with the same `key` to publish several versions. `kind` is the stack role (`frontend` | `backend`). `wasm_type` is the implementation family (motoko, rust, basilisk, baton, multisig, assets, …) used for UI tags and to gate Basilisk-only tooling. A `frontend`-kind template may carry an `asset` (a file uploaded to the registry); Casals uploads it into each stand built from that template after install, so the certified-assets canister actually serves a page.

templates.description: Rust hello-world canister (ic-cdk greet update; logs the name).
Motoko hello-world canister (greet update; logs the name).
Basilisk (Python) hello-world canister (greet + introspection).
Basilisk hello-world v1.1 — greeting tagged with the version.
Basilisk hello-world v1.2 — greet is an update that logs the name (ic-basilisk-toolkit logger).
DFINITY certified assets canister serving a hello-world page.
Baton v1.3.0 — managed_asset_provision action: registry-backed frontend bundle provisioning under the same N-of-M approval.
Baton v1.2.9 — execute:managed_upgrade capability; orchestration permission split.
Baton v1.2.8 — verbose per-canister pipeline logs; N-of-M approval.

Baton v1.2.5 — per-proposal bake_window_seconds on upgrade payload.
Baton v1.2.4 — skip in-flight bake when bake_window_seconds is 0.
Baton v1.2.3 — configurable smoke test in VERIFY phase.
Baton v1.2.2 — skip health_check verify for Basilisk targets.
Baton v1.2.1 — chunked registry pull/install (large WASM support).
Baton v1.2 — registry-backed WASM at upgrade time (no local staging).
Baton v1.1 — manage_managed_canisters capability for register/remove.
n-of-m multisig canister: top commander and IC controller of Batons.
Multisig v1.1 — per-proposal expiry override on propose().
